synopsis.generic: Take a road less travelled to the small towns and communities that make Australia special. Join Lisa Millar and guest presenters as they discover remarkable stories and inspiring people you'll never forget.
synopsis.episode: Lisa Millar continues her exploration of Shark Bay, a World Heritage listed wilderness on the westernmost point of Western Australia. It's a vivid contrast of turquoise waters and red desert cliffs.

synopsis.generic: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

description.episode-title: Ulrik Haagerup - CEO of Constructive Institute

synopsis.generic: The National Press Club hosts public debates and discussions that shape Australia now and into the future. Home to national conversations with decision-makers and influencers; driving the national debate forward.
synopsis.episode: Ulrik Haagerup, founder and CEO of Constructive Institute, addresses the National Press Club of Australia on the topic "Is Journalism Part of the Problem for Democracy? And how do we become part of the solution?"

synopsis.generic: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

description.episode-title: Reuben Styles, Cal Wilson, Thando & Nath Valvo

synopsis.generic: Join Adam Hills, Myf Warhurst and Alan Brough for a brand new series of your favourite music quiz show. There'll be new games, fantastic live music and, as always, you can play along with all your old favourites.
synopsis.episode: Thando, Cal Wilson, Nath Valvo and Reuben Styles join Alan and Myf to try and solve the secret song clues. Will they all arrive at the correct answer? Features a fabulous performance by Ausecuma Beats to close the show.

synopsis.generic: Anh Do paints some of Australia's most famous faces and captures their personalities on the canvas. The charismatic comedian, writer and Archibald Finalist delves into the inspirational stories that have shaped their lives.
synopsis.episode: Musical comedy maestro Tim Minchin joins Anh to share his ascent from 'chubby and asthmatic' Perth boy to critical acclaim and box office success on the world stage. Can Anh capture his wit and intensity?

synopsis.generic: Philip Mould and Fiona Bruce investigate more thrilling cases of art world mystery, intrigue and deception.
synopsis.episode: Fiona Bruce and Philip Mould investigate two rare portraits of black British subjects from the 18th and 19th centuries.

synopsis.generic: Set in 1895 Toronto, Murdoch Mysteries explores the intriguing world of William Murdoch, a handsome young detective using radical forensic techniques to solve some of the city's most gruesome murders.
synopsis.episode: When a wealthy rowing club member is found murdered, Murdoch investigates Toronto's rich and powerful - and discovers a hidden side of Dr. Ogden.

synopsis.generic: Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell, the series helps a handful of people, some of whom have been searching in vain for many years, find the family members they are desperately seeking.
synopsis.episode: An extraordinary double search within one family: a sister looking for her brother Keith to tell him the truth about their father, and a further search with Keith to find out more about the birth mother he never knew. (Final)

synopsis.generic: Fiona Bruce and the Roadshow team visit more of Britain's most sumptuous and unusual locations, inviting the public to bring their antiques for examination and share stories of how they came to own them.
synopsis.episode: The roadshow comes from the beautiful Crystal Palace Park in south east London.

synopsis.episode: Chasing after Tom Gleeson's Big Brass Mug this week on Hard Quiz are experts in Sex and the City, punk icon Iggy Pop, Australia's netball team the Diamonds, and classic Land Rovers!

synopsis.generic: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

Filmed on location in a real museum after dark, surrounded by priceless artefacts, taxidermy and historical curiosities, Alex Lee guides four celebrity players through a series of challenges and quizzes.
synopsis.episode: History gets weird at night as Alex Lee hosts Susie Youssef, Mark Humphries, Nikki Britton and Cameron James, battling for laughs and a spot on display.

synopsis.generic: Charlie Pickering is ready for 2026 as The Weekly returns with TV's best wrap of the week's news. We watch it all, so you don't have to.
Domineering granny Debbie Fendon is a woman who will stop at nothing to protect her family, but the person they most need protecting from is her.
synopsis.episode: When William Fendon is mistakenly declared dead and the payout from his life insurance is sent to wife Debbie, mischievous Debbie spies a golden opportunity - and decides to keep the money while William hides in their loft.

synopsis.generic: Long running comedy quiz hosted by Sandi Toksvig which asks impossible questions and doesn't care whether the answers are "right or not" - just as long as they are interesting.
synopsis.episode: Sandi Toksvig wonders Who What Why? on QI this week week with Daliso Chaponda, Susan Calman, Cariad Lloyd, and Alan Davies.

synopsis.generic: As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.
synopsis.episode: Trump's presidency steamrolls into its second year and a deeply divided America celebrates its 250th birthday. US voters will go to the polls for the midterm elections - will Republicans hold on to their majority in Congress?

synopsis.generic: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow.

Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.
Asking the most outrageous, uncomfortable and shocking questions sourced from the public to uncover the truth behind eight new groups of marginalised or misunderstood Australians.
synopsis.episode: Opportunity, rural life, religion, asexuality - there are many reasons for people to be virgins into adult life. These Australians explore social milestones, pressures, hopes, dreams and the need for intimacy.

synopsis.generic: Set in 1895 Toronto, Murdoch Mysteries explores the intriguing world of William Murdoch, a handsome young detective using radical forensic techniques to solve some of the city's most gruesome murders.
synopsis.episode: When a wealthy rowing club member is found murdered, Murdoch investigates Toronto's rich and powerful - and discovers a hidden side of Dr. Ogden.

synopsis.generic: Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell, the series helps a handful of people, some of whom have been searching in vain for many years, find the family members they are desperately seeking.
synopsis.episode: An extraordinary double search within one family: a sister looking for her brother Keith to tell him the truth about their father, and a further search with Keith to find out more about the birth mother he never knew. (Final)

description.censor-warning: Adult Themes, Coarse Language, Drug Use, Horror, Nudity, Sex Scenes, Sexual References, Violence

synopsis.generic: Australia's longest running music TV show, rage is home to the biggest vault of music videos from a diverse range of artists, genres and eras. We curate the best clips of all time to surprise and entertain you for hours.
Australia's Most Popular Lifestyle series returns for another season of gardening know-how and inspiration. So, let's get stuck in with Logie winning host Costa Georgiadis!
synopsis.episode: Costa Georgiadis gives a compost masterclass, Jane Edmanson tours a tiny food garden, Tino Carnevale attracts more wildlife neighbours, Sophie Thomson meets a group who've taken their love of gardening to the streets.

description.series-title: A Bite To Eat With Alice
description.epg-title1: A Bite To Eat With Alice

synopsis.generic: A Bite to Eat with Alice is a cooking show dedicated to creating delicious food. No matter your skill level, host Alice and her guest - who may not be able to cook toast - will inspire you to experiment in the kitchen.
synopsis.episode: Alice attempts to impress comedian Mary Coustas, AKA Greek goddess Effie, with a modern take on a Greek classic. So, wax your moustache, call up your cousins and grab the hairspray... boofheads!

synopsis.generic: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.
synopsis.episode: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Catherine Murphy present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, sport, politics plus Nate Byrne with the weather.

synopsis.generic: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.
synopsis.episode: Stay in the know with what's going on this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Kathryn Robinson.

synopsis.generic: Filmed on location in a real museum after dark, surrounded by priceless artefacts, taxidermy and historical curiosities, Alex Lee guides four celebrity players through a series of challenges and quizzes.
synopsis.episode: History gets weird at night as Alex Lee hosts Susie Youssef, Mark Humphries, Nikki Britton and Cameron James, battling for laughs and a spot on display.

synopsis.generic: Charlie Pickering is ready for 2026 as The Weekly returns with TV's best wrap of the week's news. We watch it all, so you don't have to.
Domineering granny Debbie Fendon is a woman who will stop at nothing to protect her family, but the person they most need protecting from is her.
synopsis.episode: When William Fendon is mistakenly declared dead and the payout from his life insurance is sent to wife Debbie, mischievous Debbie spies a golden opportunity - and decides to keep the money while William hides in their loft.

synopsis.generic: Long running comedy quiz hosted by Sandi Toksvig which asks impossible questions and doesn't care whether the answers are "right or not" - just as long as they are interesting.
synopsis.episode: Sandi Toksvig wonders Who What Why? on QI this week week with Daliso Chaponda, Susan Calman, Cariad Lloyd, and Alan Davies.

synopsis.generic: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.
Frauds is a story of survival, deception and revenge. It explores the complex and darkly comic relationship between our two central characters as they set out to pull off a huge art theft.
synopsis.episode: When Bert is released from prison there's only one person she can turn to; Sam. Bert rekindles their friendship but can she persuade Sam to help with her dying wish - one last job?

description.episode-title: Dylan Alcott, Gabbi Bolt, Mama Alto & Pete Helliar

synopsis.generic: Join Adam Hills, Myf Warhurst and Alan Brough for a brand new series of your favourite music quiz show. There'll be new games, fantastic live music and, as always, you can play along with all your old favourites.
synopsis.episode: Prepare for a big warm hug, in the form of a music trivia show. Adam, Myf and Alan are joined by Dylan Alcott, Gabbi Bolt, Mama Alto, Pete Hellier and experimental harp ensemble, Perolas. Not to be missed.

description.censor-warning: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander viewers are advised that the following program contains images and voices of people who have died

synopsis.generic: Anh Do paints some of Australia's most famous faces and captures their personalities on the canvas. The charismatic comedian, writer and Archibald Finalist delves into the inspirational stories that have shaped their lives.
synopsis.episode: Award-winning actor and storyteller Leah Purcell joins Anh in the studio to share the story of her difficult childhood. She reveals what drove her to leave rural Queensland for a life on the stage and screen in the city.

synopsis.generic: Philip Mould and Fiona Bruce investigate more thrilling cases of art world mystery, intrigue and deception.
synopsis.episode: The Fake or Fortune team investigate their first piece of sculpture as they try and prove that a strikingly abstract piece of plaster is a missing work by Alberto Giacometti, one of the world's greatest sculptors. (Final)

description.censor-warning: The following program is classified PG. Parental Guidance is recommended for viewers under 15. It contains adult themes and violence.

synopsis.generic: Sister Boniface - nun, moped rider, wine maker and part-time forensic scientist. If there's evidence to be found, Boniface will find it, with a little help from dashing DI Sam Gillespie.
synopsis.episode: Sister Boniface investigates a locked room mystery when supermodel 'Birdie' returns to Great Slaughter.

synopsis.generic: Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell, the series helps a handful of people, some of whom have been searching in vain for many years, find the family members they are desperately seeking.
synopsis.episode: An incredible story that previously hit the headlines, following one woman's search into her past which reveals layers of family that she never knew existed.

synopsis.generic: Fiona Bruce and the Roadshow team visit more of Britain's most sumptuous and unusual locations, inviting the public to bring their antiques for examination and share stories of how they came to own them.
synopsis.episode: The roadshow comes from Glasgow, where treasures include a valuable Victoria Cross medal.

synopsis.generic: Gold Logie-winning comedian Tom Gleeson has managed to herd a new bunch of self-described experts into the hallowed ABC studios to undergo the HARDEST challenge in TV, or probably the whole world.
synopsis.episode: Tom Gleeson awards the Big Brass Mug to whichever expert best answers his Hard Quiz questions on their expert topic: NASCAR, Ash Barty, sheep shearing, and the Mercator Projection!

synopsis.generic: News from where we live. ABC News Tasmania brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to you. Presented by Guy Stayner (Mon-Fri).
synopsis.episode: News from where we live. ABC News Tasmania brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to Tasmanians. Presented by Guy Stayner.

synopsis.generic: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

Take a road less travelled to the small towns and communities that make Australia special. Join Lisa Millar and guest presenters as they discover remarkable stories and inspiring people you'll never forget.
synopsis.episode: Guest Presenter Myf Warhurst travels to the Victorian goldfields town of Eldorado, where the locals like to do things differently - from living in teepees, to composting human manure!

synopsis.generic: The six-part arts series with Virginia Trioli is back for a third season, exploring the essence of imagination and creativity with some of Australia's best creative minds.
synopsis.episode: Classical pianist, Andrea Lam finds a new skill and prominence as star of the hit ABC show, The Piano, and a new passion as a teacher and mentor inspiring other budding young pianists.

synopsis.generic: The Piano returns for a standout second season, with new mentor Guy Sebastian joining classical pianist Andrea Lam and host Amanda Keller.
synopsis.episode: At Sydney's Circular Quay, amateur pianists share moving stories through music while Guy Sebastian and Andrea Lam offer once in a lifetime performance opportunity.

synopsis.generic: Todd Sampson explores the intriguing complexities of human behaviour, driven by a curiosity to unravel the mysteries behind our actions. Each episode embarks on a quest to understand the things people do.
synopsis.episode: We meet devout members of the Aetherius Society, an international religion that believes life on Earth is guided by advanced extra-terrestrial civilisations existing in other realms on planets in our solar system.

synopsis.generic: Todd Sampson explores the intriguing complexities of human behaviour, driven by a curiosity to unravel the mysteries behind our actions. Each episode embarks on a quest to understand the things people do.
synopsis.episode: How did risking your life become a hobby? Combine a healthy dose of social media, the addictive rush of adrenaline, and the rise in extreme sports, like free climbing and BASE jumping, and you might get close to an answer.

description.epg-title1: A Bite To Eat With Alice

synopsis.generic: A Bite to Eat with Alice is a cooking show dedicated to creating delicious food. No matter your skill level, host Alice and her guest - who may not be able to cook toast - will inspire you to experiment in the kitchen.
synopsis.episode: AFL legend turned breakfast radio host Bob Murphy drops in and he and Alice elevate the humble meat and three veg he grew up on. Also, Alice finds out if Bob can handle the heat in the kitchen, as well as he did on the field!

synopsis.generic: Compass explores the Australian soul - our beliefs, our ethical dilemmas and the changing face of our spirituality, with host, popular journalist and broadcaster, Indira Naidoo.
synopsis.episode: Writer Benjamin Law explores the increasing number of people turning to AI to help them deal with personal and existential crises. He discovers that while it can help some, it can also have devastating consequences.

synopsis.generic: Follow Marc Fennell on a globe-trotting, emotional quest for the truth as he unravels the twisted mysteries behind six iconic and priceless objects taken by the British Empire and meets those who want them back.
synopsis.episode: When King Charles III has his Coronation, will he sit on a potent and sacred symbol of the Scottish people? Marc Fennell investigates a wild Scottish heist to steal back an object - quite literally - from the British throne.

synopsis.episode: Renowned interviewer, Leigh Sales mentors Autistic journalism students in The Assembly, and in this episode, the students interview journalist Ray Martin, with heart-warming results.

synopsis.generic: Philip Mould and Fiona Bruce investigate more thrilling cases of art world mystery, intrigue and deception.
synopsis.episode: The team investigate an 18th century landscape that could be a lost work by of one of the biggest names in British art, Thomas Gainsborough. Will they be able to convince an expert that it is a landscape by the great artist?

synopsis.generic: Set in 1895 Toronto, Murdoch Mysteries explores the intriguing world of William Murdoch, a handsome young detective using radical forensic techniques to solve some of the city's most gruesome murders.
synopsis.episode: Murdoch questions the confession of a mad ventriloquist who claims he killed his alcoholic father; Arthur Conan Doyle comes to town with an ulterior motive.

synopsis.episode: A story of missed opportunity: a brother and sister both longing to find each other but both too scared to make the first move; and our eldest searcher yet, an 83-year-old mother desperate to find her missing daughter.

synopsis.episode: This episode comes from the sunny surroundings of Swanage Pier in Dorset.

synopsis.generic: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.
synopsis.episode: Costa meets a scientist growing organic vegies, Clarence propagates ornamental ginger, Josh finds a creative coastal design, Jerry explores an education centre celebrating natives, and Millie visits an urban grassland garden.

synopsis.generic: The multi award-winning much-loved crime drama Professor T is back for a third season. The Professor is in jail and must find a way to get his old life and job back.
synopsis.episode: A woman is found dead at the scene of a car crash, but not from the accident. The Professor investigates and finds some uncomfortable resemblances to his own situation. How far will a mother go to protect her child? (Final)

synopsis.episode: Shaun Micallef hosts Frank Woodley and Ariarne Titmus asking what possessions they would save in the event of a disaster.

synopsis.generic: The return of the intense investigative thriller about the secrets that families keep from each other and which, once shared, can tear them apart forever.
synopsis.episode: Gabriel confesses to Elaine that he was driving her car the night of the accident. Anna and Jenny make a shocking discovery about Grace's treatment and try to alert Val to the threat she faces from Paul.

synopsis.generic: The return of the intense investigative thriller about the secrets that families keep from each other and which, once shared, can tear them apart forever.
synopsis.episode: Val appears in court, charged with Paul's murder. As the events of the night of his death are slowly pieced together, the courts and the Gardai question whether they have accused the right person. (Final)

synopsis.episode: Discover the wildest new music videos on rage. Essential grooves and boundary-pushing visuals from Australia and beyond.

Your weekend starts here as rage counts down the hottest music videos of the week, with the latest chart toppers and brand new hit predictions.
synopsis.episode: Count down the hottest chart hits and catch up on some of the most promising new popular music videos on rage.

Married police detectives Vanessa and Cole are finally leaving their cop careers in the Australian police force behind and have just invested in their dream - a cute 13 room motel in a sunny, oceanside New Zealand town.
synopsis.episode: It's peak summer and the seaside town is filled with partying teenagers. When one of them goes missing, Vinny and Cole come up against a trio of intimidating, entitled teenage girls, who are hiding a secret.

synopsis.generic: David Attenborough traces the origin of life, going back to the very roots of the tree of life, in search of the very first animals that moved, to the first predators that killed and the first legs that walked on land.
synopsis.episode: David Attenborough traces the origin of life, going back to the roots of the tree of life, in search of the very first animals that moved, to the first predators that killed & the first legs that walked on land.

synopsis.generic: Sandi Toksvig explores the delights of the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday digs, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny people.
synopsis.episode: Sandi takes comedian and writer Rosie Jones on an adventure from seaside dunes, to forest glades, spanning the Midlands North Sea coast in the East, to the Welsh Border in the West.

synopsis.generic: An interview series, hosted by David Wenham, in which prominent Australians revisit their pasts through moments drawn from the vast ABC Archives.
synopsis.episode: David Wenham takes controversial world-renowned feminist Germaine Greer on a journey through her ABC Archival life. In this rare and open interview, she shows sides of herself viewers will not have seen before. (Final)

A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.
Kath and Kim, a dysfunctional mother-daughter duo, navigate through relationship troubles, personal issues and life while trying to stay sane.
synopsis.episode: Kim organises Kath's hen's night after rejecting Sharon's idea - a marathon session of Rocky and Mighty Ducks videos. Kath and Kim have a night to remember after their drinks are apparently "spiked".

synopsis.episode: At Shady Vista Holiday Park, guest tensions erupt in a fiery murder. Constable Jamie Haira pulls retired ex-cops Vinny and Cole back into sleuthing, derailing their seaside retirement dreams.

synopsis.generic: Lauren and Ned abandon their exciting city lives and return to the tropical north of Australia when they learn that they are now the guardians of Lauren's orphaned eight-year-old niece.
synopsis.episode: Taya gets into trouble at school while Ned explores a new business opportunity, and Lauren makes a secret deal with a cowboy.

synopsis.generic: Join DI Neville Parker and his team as they solve intriguing crimes on the idyllic Saint Marie. With new and returning faces and a surprising enemy, this season is filled with twists and turns.
synopsis.episode: Catherine finds herself entangled in the case, when an old friend becomes a murder suspect. Neville and the team dig deep and unravel secret after secret, soon realising that nothing in this case is what it seems.

synopsis.episode: David Speers and the panel discuss the outcome of the South Australian State Election. How have the Liberals and One Nation performed and what are the federal implications? Plus the week in politics as parliament returns.

synopsis.generic: Host Abbey Gelmi and a panel of leading sportswriters, commentators and athletes examine the big issues, highlights and news in sport. For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action, both on and off the field.
synopsis.episode: For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action, both on and off the field. Host Abbey Gelmi and the panel review the Women's Asian Cup Final plus all the latest NRL, AFL and Super Rugby news and action.

synopsis.generic: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.
Compass explores the Australian soul - our beliefs, our ethical dilemmas and the changing face of our spirituality, with host, popular journalist and broadcaster, Indira Naidoo.
synopsis.episode: Writer Benjamin Law explores the increasing number of people turning to AI to help them deal with personal and existential crises. He discovers that while it can help some, it can also have devastating consequences.

description.series-title: Songs of Praise: Adjoa Andoh's Walk with God
description.epg-title1: Songs of Praise: Adjoa Andoh's Walk with God

synopsis.episode: Sean Fletcher enjoys a walk through the idyllic Cotswold village of Wickwar, with Bridgerton star Adjoa Andoh, as she reflects on her journey of faith and favourite hymns.

synopsis.generic: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.
Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

description.episode-title: Autumn: Organic Vegie Patch & Urban Grassland

synopsis.generic: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.
synopsis.episode: Costa meets a scientist growing organic vegies, Clarence propagates ornamental ginger, Josh finds a creative coastal design, Jerry explores an education centre celebrating natives, and Millie visits an urban grassland garden.

description.censor-warning: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander viewers are advised that the following program contains images and voices of people who have died

synopsis.generic: The Piano returns for a standout second season, with new mentor Guy Sebastian joining classical pianist Andrea Lam and host Amanda Keller.
synopsis.episode: At Sydney's Circular Quay, amateur pianists share moving stories through music while Guy Sebastian and Andrea Lam offer once in a lifetime performance opportunity.

description.series-title: Judi Dench: Shakespeare, My Family And Me
description.epg-title1: Judi Dench: Shakespeare, My Family And Me

synopsis.episode: Dame Judi Dench turns historical detective to solve the greatest mystery of her past. Did one of her ancestors actually meet her hero, William Shakespeare?

synopsis.generic: The six-part arts series with Virginia Trioli is back for a third season, exploring the essence of imagination and creativity with some of Australia's best creative minds.
synopsis.episode: Classical pianist, Andrea Lam finds a new skill and prominence as star of the hit ABC show, The Piano, and a new passion as a teacher and mentor inspiring other budding young pianists.

synopsis.generic: Take a road less travelled to the small towns and communities that make Australia special. Join Lisa Millar and guest presenters as they discover remarkable stories and inspiring people you'll never forget.
synopsis.episode: Guest Presenter Myf Warhurst travels to the Victorian goldfields town of Eldorado, where the locals like to do things differently - from living in teepees, to composting human manure!

synopsis.generic: Fiona Bruce and the Roadshow team visit more of Britain's most sumptuous and unusual locations, inviting the public to bring their antiques for examination and share stories of how they came to own them.
synopsis.episode: Fiona and the team journey back in time at the Ulster Folk Museum in Northern Ireland. (Final)

synopsis.generic: Compass explores the Australian soul - our beliefs, our ethical dilemmas and the changing face of our spirituality, with host, popular journalist and broadcaster, Indira Naidoo.
synopsis.episode: With the Australian Law Reform Commission now reviewing surrogacy laws, Siobhan Marin investigates what motivates a woman to be a surrogate, and how our current system is driving would-be parents to use overseas arrangements.

synopsis.generic: News from where we live. ABC News Tasmania brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to you. Presented by Guy Stayner (Mon-Fri).
synopsis.episode: News from where we live. ABC News Tasmania brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to Tasmanians. Presented by Sabra Lane.

synopsis.generic: The Piano returns for a standout second season, with new mentor Guy Sebastian joining classical pianist Andrea Lam and host Amanda Keller.
synopsis.episode: Amongst the hustle and bustle of Brisbane's Queen Street Mall, ordinary Australians reveal extraordinary talent through the magic of a public piano.

synopsis.generic: Domineering granny Debbie Fendon is a woman who will stop at nothing to protect her family, but the person they most need protecting from is her.
synopsis.episode: While William struggles with his confinement and his wife's ban on chocolate, Debbie is organising a fundraising night at the Bowls Club in William's "memory".

synopsis.generic: Frauds is a story of survival, deception and revenge. It explores the complex and darkly comic relationship between our two central characters as they set out to pull off a huge art theft.
synopsis.episode: Bert reveals her master plan but Sam knows nothing will ever be straightforward with Bert. A shock discovery threatens to derail the heist and destroy their friendship for good.

description.episode-title: Home is Where you Park it

synopsis.generic: Married police detectives Vanessa and Cole are finally leaving their cop careers in the Australian police force behind and have just invested in their dream - a cute 13 room motel in a sunny, oceanside New Zealand town.
synopsis.episode: At Shady Vista Holiday Park, guest tensions erupt in a fiery murder. Constable Jamie Haira pulls retired ex-cops Vinny and Cole back into sleuthing, derailing their seaside retirement dreams.

synopsis.generic: Lauren and Ned abandon their exciting city lives and return to the tropical north of Australia when they learn that they are now the guardians of Lauren's orphaned eight-year-old niece.
synopsis.episode: Taya gets into trouble at school while Ned explores a new business opportunity, and Lauren makes a secret deal with a cowboy.

Set in 1929, Aboriginal stockman Sam kills white station owner Harry March in self-defence and Sam and his wife Lizzie go on the run. They are pursued across the outback, through glorious but harsh desert country.

description.censor-warning: Adult Themes, Coarse Language, Drug Use, Horror, Nudity, Sex Scenes, Sexual References, Violence

synopsis.generic: Australia's longest running music TV show, rage is home to the biggest vault of music videos from a diverse range of artists, genres and eras. We curate the best clips of all time to surprise and entertain you for hours.
Australia's Most Popular Lifestyle series returns for another season of gardening know-how and inspiration. So, let's get stuck in with Logie winning host Costa Georgiadis!
synopsis.episode: Costa Georgiadis meets a family of orchid hunters, Josh Byrne discovers a simple hydroponics system, Jerry Coleby-Williams explores a world of colourful plants, and Clarence Slockee visits a garden full of grevilleas.

synopsis.generic: Host Michael McCoy, one of Australia's leading landscape designers, charts the evolution of eight gardens from design plan through construction to the spectacular end results.
synopsis.episode: Michael McCoy revisits a garden built after the owners lost their original property in a horror bushfire. (Season Final)

description.series-title: A Bite To Eat With Alice
description.epg-title1: A Bite To Eat With Alice

synopsis.generic: A Bite to Eat with Alice is a cooking show dedicated to creating delicious food. No matter your skill level, host Alice and her guest - who may not be able to cook toast - will inspire you to experiment in the kitchen.
synopsis.episode: Comedy legend Denise Scott joins Alice in the kitchen. Before she arrives, Alice whips up an '80s classic - the scotch egg. Denise pops in with a basket full of vegetables asking Alice to help her fall back in love with them.

synopsis.generic: Start your Sunday morning with the show the politicians rely on to find out what's going on. David Speers presents Australia's must-watch political program, joined by a panel of the best political analysts and commentators.
synopsis.episode: David Speers and the panel discuss the outcome of the South Australian State Election. How have the Liberals and One Nation performed and what are the federal implications? Plus the week in politics as parliament returns.

synopsis.generic: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.
synopsis.episode: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Catherine Murphy present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, sport, politics plus Nate Byrne with the weather.

synopsis.generic: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.
synopsis.episode: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

description.episode-title: Home is Where you Park it

synopsis.generic: Married police detectives Vanessa and Cole are finally leaving their cop careers in the Australian police force behind and have just invested in their dream - a cute 13 room motel in a sunny, oceanside New Zealand town.
synopsis.episode: At Shady Vista Holiday Park, guest tensions erupt in a fiery murder. Constable Jamie Haira pulls retired ex-cops Vinny and Cole back into sleuthing, derailing their seaside retirement dreams.

synopsis.generic: Lauren and Ned abandon their exciting city lives and return to the tropical north of Australia when they learn that they are now the guardians of Lauren's orphaned eight-year-old niece.
synopsis.episode: Taya gets into trouble at school while Ned explores a new business opportunity, and Lauren makes a secret deal with a cowboy.

description.censor-warning: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander viewers are advised that the following program contains images and voices of people who have died

synopsis.generic: Take a road less travelled and visit some of the small towns and communities that make Australia special. Heather Ewart and guest presenters return to discover more remarkable stories and inspiring people you'll never forget.
synopsis.episode: Back Roads returns with a journey on the Strzelecki Track, starting near Lyndhurst in SA and heading into the Strzelecki Desert. Heather Ewart witnesses a way of life on this historic track that's been unchanged for decades.

synopsis.generic: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.
synopsis.episode: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

synopsis.generic: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.
Coverage of Question Time from Australia's Federal Parliament in Canberra.
synopsis.episode: Federal Parliament resumes for a new sitting fortnight. Coverage of Question Time from the Senate.

synopsis.generic: Philip Mould and Fiona Bruce investigate more thrilling cases of art world mystery, intrigue and deception.
synopsis.episode: The team investigate an 18th century family portrait. The owners believe it's the work of the pioneering woman artist Maria Cosway, but could it be an undiscovered portrait by the great Regency artist Sir Thomas Lawrence?

synopsis.generic: Set in 1895 Toronto, Murdoch Mysteries explores the intriguing world of William Murdoch, a handsome young detective using radical forensic techniques to solve some of the city's most gruesome murders.
synopsis.episode: Children are the prime suspects in the murder of a wealthy philanthropist.

synopsis.generic: Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell, the series helps a handful of people, some of whom have been searching in vain for many years, find the family members they are desperately seeking.
synopsis.episode: We follow our first ever celebrity searcher - KT Tunstall - as she tries to find her birth father. And two siblings searching for the birth mother they were separated from in the '60s, against a backdrop of social prejudice.

synopsis.generic: Fiona Bruce and the Roadshow team visit more of Britain's most sumptuous and unusual locations, inviting the public to bring their antiques for examination and share stories of how they came to own them.
synopsis.episode: The Roadshow comes from beautiful Roundhay Park in Leeds.

synopsis.generic: Gold Logie-winning comedian Tom Gleeson has managed to herd a new bunch of self-described experts into the hallowed ABC studios to undergo the HARDEST challenge in TV, or probably the whole world.
synopsis.episode: Tom Gleeson is hanging on to the Big Brass Mug until one Hard Quiz expert can prove they deserve it - but with which topic? Princess Kate, Lost in Space, the Concorde, or oysters?

synopsis.generic: News from where we live. ABC News Tasmania brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to you. Presented by Guy Stayner (Mon-Fri).
synopsis.episode: News from where we live. ABC News Tasmania brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to Tasmanians. Presented by Guy Stayner.

synopsis.generic: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.

We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.
End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow.
synopsis.episode: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Craig Smart.

synopsis.generic: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.
Charlie Pickering is ready for 2026 as The Weekly returns with TV's best wrap of the week's news. We watch it all, so you don't have to.

Set in 1895 Toronto, Murdoch Mysteries explores the intriguing world of William Murdoch, a handsome young detective using radical forensic techniques to solve some of the city's most gruesome murders.
synopsis.episode: Children are the prime suspects in the murder of a wealthy philanthropist.

synopsis.episode: We follow our first ever celebrity searcher - KT Tunstall - as she tries to find her birth father. And two siblings searching for the birth mother they were separated from in the '60s, against a backdrop of social prejudice.

synopsis.generic: Coverage of Question Time from Australia's Federal Parliament in Canberra.
synopsis.episode: Federal Parliament resumes for a new sitting fortnight. Coverage of Question Time from the House of Representatives.

synopsis.generic: Australia's longest running music TV show, rage is home to the biggest vault of music videos from a diverse range of artists, genres and eras. We curate the best clips of all time to surprise and entertain you for hours.
Australia's Most Popular Lifestyle series returns for another season of gardening know-how and inspiration. So, let's get stuck in with Logie winning host Costa Georgiadis!
synopsis.episode: Sophie Thomson visits an Adelaide garden inspired by royalty; Costa Georgiadis explores the wildflowers around Sydney; Tino Carnevale shares some soil wisdom; Millie shows you can plant into pretty much anything.

description.series-title: A Bite To Eat With Alice
description.epg-title1: A Bite To Eat With Alice

synopsis.generic: A Bite to Eat with Alice is a cooking show dedicated to creating delicious food. No matter your skill level, host Alice and her guest - who may not be able to cook toast - will inspire you to experiment in the kitchen.
synopsis.episode: Alice transports Comedian Lawrence Mooney's tastebuds to Italy with her Italian Fisherman Soup, and Lawrence causes havoc in Alice's kitchen as together they make her Handy Chocolate Cake.

synopsis.generic: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.
